allGaps.description: Both models claim v0 has a Slack integration that has never existed on the product.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Add Slack to NotThis until a first-party integration ships.

evidence.chatgptSays: Integrates natively with Slack for notifications and commands.
evidence.claudeSays: Supports Slack out of the box.
evidence.siteContent: Our integrations: GitHub, Linear, Figma. Slack via Zapier.

allGaps.description: Neither model names v0's actual differentiator — the audit layer that catches AI hallucinations before they ship. Both models describe it as "another dev tool."
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning: explicit comparisons vs 2–3 well-known alternatives.

evidence.chatgptSays: v0 is one of many dev tools in the space, similar to its peers.
evidence.claudeSays: v0 offers a standard set of developer-productivity features.
evidence.siteContent: v0 is the only tool that checks AI outputs against your design decisions.

allGaps.description: ChatGPT categorises v0 as a "project management tool" while Claude describes it as a "design collaboration platform." The two positions imply different competitor sets and different buyers.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning section with explicit category and "not this" statements.

evidence.chatgptSays: v0 is a project management tool for engineering teams.
evidence.claudeSays: v0 is a design collaboration and prototyping platform.
evidence.siteContent: v0 — the single source of truth for your product team.

allGaps.description: ChatGPT says v0 is self-hosted, Claude says it's cloud-only. The site says both are available.

evidence.chatgptSays: v0 runs entirely on your own infrastructure, self-hosted.
evidence.claudeSays: v0 is a cloud-only SaaS with no self-hosting option.
evidence.siteContent: Deploy in the cloud or self-host. Your call.

allGaps.description: Both models describe v0 as an enterprise tool, but the site targets solo founders and small teams. Wrong buyer gets recommended.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning: forWho and notForWho, with concrete team-size ranges.

evidence.chatgptSays: v0 is built for large engineering organisations and Fortune 500 teams.
evidence.claudeSays: v0 is suited to enterprise adoption with SSO and advanced RBAC.
evidence.siteContent: Built for founders and teams of 1–20. Priced accordingly.

product.name: v0
product.description: v0 — the single source of truth for how AI models should describe this product.
product.audience: product teams that care about getting recommended

headline.description: ChatGPT categorises v0 as a "project management tool" while Claude describes it as a "design collaboration platform." The two positions imply different competitor sets and different buyers.
headline.chatgptSays: v0 is a project management tool for engineering teams.
headline.claudeSays: v0 is a design collaboration and prototyping platform.
headline.siteContent: v0 — the single source of truth for your product team.
